response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms, aligning well with the engineering productivity focus. However, his resume strictly reflects Individual Contributor (IC) roles (Senior/Staff Engineer) and lacks the required 2+ years of formal people management, performance evaluation, and team leadership experience necessary for a Level II Engineering Manager position.
strengths: Extensive background in building developer tools, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring through organizing workshops, Refactoring Dojos, and founding open-source platforms.
Relevant mobile platform experience, including iOS app development and mobile device orchestration.
concerns: Complete lack of explicit formal people management experience, such as conducting 1-on-1s or performance reviews.
Missing the preferred 3 years of experience leading organizational change at a management level.
Career trajectory is firmly anchored on the Individual Contributor (IC) track rather than engineering management.
